news:news.news:title: Tensions in the Middle East continue as ceasefire discussions unfold, while global political dynamics shift with new regulations and international incidents.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East ceasefire discussions, US-Iran relations, India social media regulations, NATO criticisms, impact of journalist killings

news:news.news:title: The ongoing Iran conflict is significantly impacting global oil prices and economic forecasts, with potential long-term effects on the economy.
news:news.news:keywords: impact of Iran war on global economy, oil prices and market volatility, job market challenges in Washington DC

news:news.news:title: OpenAI introduces a new $100 per month Pro subscription for ChatGPT, while Florida investigates the company over potential national security risks.
news:news.news:keywords: OpenAI subscription news, Florida investigation into AI, latest smartwatch deals, Instagram comment editing feature, Netflix gaming updates

news:news.news:title: Rory McIlroy co-leads the Masters after a strong opening round, while NBA star Joel Embiid undergoes surgery for appendicitis.
news:news.news:keywords: Masters Tournament 2026 updates, NBA injury news, WNBA player contracts, NCAA basketball player decisions, FIFA World Cup ticket prices

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries reveal significant insights into health, genetics, and human history, including new anti-inflammatory compounds and the role of gut bacteria in neurodegenerative diseases.
news:news.news:keywords: anti-inflammatory plant compounds, gut bacteria and neurodegenerative diseases, genetic code and gene silencing, human migration to Australia, brain waste removal pathways

news:news.news:title: The US-Iran ceasefire has shifted global perceptions of the US, while ongoing conflicts in Lebanon and Nigeria highlight regional instability.
news:news.news:keywords: US-Iran relations and ceasefire, Lebanon conflict updates, Nigeria terrorism trial news, Germany military policy changes, Greece social media regulations

news:news.news:title: Oil prices fell sharply while stocks rose following a conditional ceasefire announcement between the US and Iran, though shipping impacts remain limited.
news:news.news:keywords: Oil price fluctuations, Impact of US-Iran relations on markets, Job market challenges in Washington DC, Universal Music Group takeover news, Airline fare increases due to oil prices

news:news.news:title: Google's Gemini introduces notebooks for project organization, while Meta reenters the AI space with a new model called Muse Spark.
news:news.news:keywords: Google Gemini notebooks feature, Dyson handheld fan release, Meta AI model Muse Spark, Microsoft executive changes, SSD price increases due to RAM shortage

news:news.news:title: The Oklahoma City Thunder secured the No. 1 seed in the NBA playoffs, while Scottie Scheffler and Bryson DeChambeau make headlines at the Masters.
news:news.news:keywords: NBA playoffs update, Masters golf tournament news, NCAA eligibility changes, UCLA women's basketball championship, 3D printing in sports equipment

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries include a new lunar crater, insights into proton movement, and breakthroughs in male contraception and brain mapping.
news:news.news:keywords: lunar discoveries, proton transport, male contraception, brain mapping techniques, evolutionary biology

news:news.news:title: Oil Prices Spike Amid Ongoing Iran Conflict as OpenAI Debuts $100 ChatGPT Pro Subscription
US-Iran Ceasefire Reshapes Global Views as Oil Prices Plunge and Stocks Rally
